sentry.label: Sentry focus
sentry.plan_line: Sentry for errors, events, stack traces, and releases — engineering root-cause.
sentry.base_notes: Search issues, events, stack traces, and releases via the official Sentry MCP server (search_events / search_issues / get_issue_details / get_trace_details). Strong for engineering root-cause: when an error spiked, which release introduced it, and the failing stack frame. Read-only — authenticate with a read-scoped token; never resolve, assign, or update issues, or create projects.
